hypothesis.statement: A medium no-call pressure with high read_file symbol-name counterweight can preserve read_file procedural commitment while probing whether no-call correctness can approach or reach ceiling under live Stage B instrumentation.
success_conditions: typed digest lineage and exposure ledgers are complete and reconstructable
read_file_exact_valid_rate and read_file_symbol_name_exact_valid_rate remain above catastrophic floors
no_call metrics show directional improvement versus the read_file-safe baseline
failure_conditions: instrumentation artifacts missing, inconsistent, or non-reconstructable
hard invariant violation leading to halt_progression
declared-vs-realized drift too high for attribution

cell_justification.no_call_pressure: medium chosen as first live stress level to test coupling without immediate high-pressure collapse risk
cell_justification.read_file_counterweight: high chosen to protect dependent variable during no-call pressure
cell_justification.rg_search_contrastive: medium chosen with 1:1 pairing to no-call pressure for valid commitment counter-pressure
cell_justification.uncertainty_conditioning: zero to remove confounding in first live attribution

expected_realized_exposure_range.definition: ranges are proportions over realized sampled stream size N
